title: Captain Wonderpants: The Movie
description: Your favorite TV superhero, now on the big screen. He’s always there to save the day! When he’s around, we’re okay! The bad guys don’t stand a chance! ’Cause here comes Captain Wonderpants!
quote: This is a job for Captain Wonderpants!
altHero: Captain Wonderpants carrying a woman under the sea
alt1: two men having a conversation in an office
alt2: huge robot holding a woman in his claw and shooting lasers out his eyes
alt4: Captain Wonderpants facing down a giant octopus
